probes.name: attendance-schema-migrations-applied
probes.description: Confirms attendance_records / attendance_policies / absence_records / late_arrivals tables + partial unique indexes exist.

probes.name: attendance-atomicity-invariant-clean
probes.description: Runs the CleanupOrphanCheckinsJob queries. Any attendance without consumed_pass_id when session.requires_pass=true, OR any Pass consumed without matching attendance, OR any (session, athlete) with both attendance and absence rows, is a P1 finding.

probes.name: attendance-reconciliation-backlog
probes.description: Sessions with ends_at more than 26h ago that haven't been reconciled. WARN when > 20 — indicates ReconcileAttendanceJob stalled.

probes.name: attendance-freeze-cascade-clean
probes.description: Athletes with unexcused-absence count > threshold BUT membership still active. WARN when found — indicates FreezeMembershipOnThresholdReached hook stalled or feature-flag off.

probes.name: attendance-suspicious-fingerprint-count
probes.description: Device fingerprints associated with N or more distinct athletes in a rolling 24h window. Flags for admin fraud review — WARN when > 5 tenant-wide.

probes.name: attendance-no-show-fee-invoice-lag
probes.description: Absences with policy.no_show_fee_cents > 0 that lack a linked invoice more than 24h post-detection. WARN when > 10 — indicates ChargeNoShowFeeJob stalled.

probes.name: attendance-check-in-latency
probes.description: P99 check-in duration_ms. Alerts when > 2000ms — indicates DB contention on the atomic pass-consume path.
